full_text:
Lu Zhi (Zigan) 盧植 (子幹)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Zhi (盧植), styledZigan (子幹), was born in Zhuo commandery. Imperial Corps Commander in service of Han. Was Liu Bei’s teacher and friend. Lu Zhi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lu Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
